content.text:
[cron:71585983-eab9-4557-924c-277a29a73768 每日02:00 OpenClaw会话索引清理] 执行 OpenClaw 会话索引夜间清理。要求：1) 先检查 coding-agent 当前是否有活跃子代理；保留仍在执行的 subagent session key，不要误删。2) 对 coding-agent 与 main 运行 scripts/openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py 清理 cron-run 与已结束 subagent；如果 coding-agent 有活跃子代理，用 --keep-key 逐个保留。3) 对 main 再执行一次 --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply。4) 只做清理，不发用户可见消息；完成后在 cron run 日志里简短记录 removed keys / backup path。
Current time: Saturday, April 18th, 2026 - 2:00 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-17 18:00 UTC

content.thinking:
Let me break down the tasks:
1. Check if coding-agent currently has active subagents
2. Run openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py on coding-agent and main
3. For main, also run --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply
4. Log results silently

Let me start by checking active subagents.
No active subagents. Let me now find the cleanup script and run it on coding-agent, then main.

content.text: Command still running (session warm-ocean, pid 59684). Use process (list/poll/log/write/kill/clear/remove) for follow-up.

content.thinking: Let me wait for that to finish.

Found the script at /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace-coding-agent/scripts/openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py.

No active subagents, so I can run the cleanup without --keep-key flags.

Let me run the cleanup script on coding-agent first, then main.

                                         [--root ROOT]

                                         [--older-than-hours OLDER_THAN_HOURS]
                                         [--keep-key KEEP_KEY] [--apply]

content.thinking:
The script needs --prune flag. Let me check what options it supports for the first cleanup run (cron-run and subagent). Let me run it for coding-agent with --prune cron-run subagent (no --apply since we just want to see what would be removed), then for main with --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply.

Actually, looking at the request again: "对 coding-agent 与 main 运行 scripts/openclaw_session_index_cleanup.py 清理 cron-run 与已结束 subagent". So it should clean cron-run and subagent for both coding-agent and main. And for main also run --prune cron-base --older-than-hours 12 --apply.


I should run it without --apply first to see what would be removed, then apply with --apply if it looks correct.
